name: 💭┃suggestions
topic:
Give suggestions for my Mods!
**Rules:**
- No trolling
- No stealing creations from others
- Only Related Stuff
- No Advertisements
- No download links to Viruses or similar if you decide to reference another mod
- Follow the #code-of-conduct channel
- Please check if others have already suggested the suggestion you want to suggest before suggesting a suggestion (*XD*)

name: 🐞┃bug-report
topic:
Report bugs from my Mods!
**Rules:**
- No trolling
- No stealing creations from others
- Only Related Stuff
- No Advertisements
- Follow the #code-of-conduct channel
- Check if the bug has already been reported before posting!
